career.name: Foothill DECA
career.title: Junior Officer of Finance
description: Oversaw chapter budgeting and financial planning using Google Sheets, streamlining expense tracking and reimbursements for 100+ members.
Planned and executed the Chipotle fundraiser netting over $1,000 in profit, contributing directly to event funding and member subsidies.

career.name: Foothill Cybersecurity Club
career.title: President
description: Created interactive cybersecurity activities and delivered technical presentations at weekly meetings to engage and educate club members.
Encouraged member participation in CTF competitions by promoting upcoming events, guiding sign-ups, and fostering a collaborative, competitive environment.
